name: Swiss Chard

pros.title: leafy-green micronutrient density is a major category strength
pros.explanation: This is exactly the kind of vegetable profile that should separate upward.

pros.title: very low-downside whole food baseline
pros.explanation: That clean baseline is one reason vegetables score so well.

pros.title: helps make meals feel more balanced
pros.explanation: The category has real value beyond single nutrients.

cons.title: energy density stays low
cons.explanation: That is useful sometimes, but not enough on its own.

cons.title: usually needs pairing to make a full meal
cons.explanation: Most vegetables are still support players.

cons.title: freshness and prep can add friction
cons.explanation: A strong paper profile still needs real-world repeat use.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
